name: osint-investigator
description: Target-agnostic OSINT investigation plugin with an MCP toolchain for archiving, source discovery, entity extraction, evidence tracking, graph export, and reproducible workflow skills.

interface.longDescription: OSINT Investigator provides a target-agnostic MCP-backed OSINT toolchain for archiving, source discovery, social/media lead tracing, sanctions and finance mapping, visual verification, geolocation workflows, evidence scoring, timelines, and graph exports.
